critical.mandate: Identify coverage gaps before writing new tests
Load unit testing knowledge for the project stack
Story must be in review status before test automation
Output must include machine-readable PASSED or FAILED verdict

step.title: Load Story and Code
step.action: Read story file, identify files changed and acceptance criteria

step.title: Status Gate
step.check: HALT: Story must be in review status before test automation

step.title: Identify Coverage Gaps
step.action: Analyze existing tests vs code paths

step.title: Load Knowledge
step.action: Load unit test patterns for the project's stack from {knowledge_path}/

step.title: Generate Tests
step.action: Write tests for uncovered code paths
Follow AAA pattern and naming conventions

step.title: Run and Validate
step.action: Execute tests, verify they pass and cover intended paths
If ALL tests pass: verdict is PASSED
If ANY test fails: verdict is FAILED — list failing tests with reasons

step.title: Generate Report
step.action: Generate automation report with coverage gaps filled and test results
step.template-output: Generate automation report with coverage gaps filled, test results, and machine-readable verdict (PASSED/FAILED).

step.title: Update Review Gate and Transition
step.action: Read story file, locate Review Gate table
If PASSED: update Test Automation row status to PASSED, link report file
If FAILED: update Test Automation row status to FAILED, link report file. Do NOT change story status — the review-gate-check protocol or run-all-reviews orchestrator handles status transitions.
step.template-output: Update story file Review Gate table with test automation result and report link.
